calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-05-2016 Off Calendar

Final Approval Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-02-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DAVID C. LIPPS & ATTY. RICHARD A. HOYER OF THE HOYER & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. 1-415-766-3538 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. ANGEL R. SEVILLA OF JACKSON & LEWIS, TEL. NO. 1-415-394-9400 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - The matter was discussed at the hearing whether the plaintiff provided proof that the Labor and Workforce Development Agency was either notified and did not object to the settlement or why no such notification should be required. The court also raised questions about the fees sought by class counsel, the "service award" sought by the plaintiff, and the method of distributing settlement payments to the class. The court ruled as follows: Final Approval Hearing is Granted. The court reduced the SERVICE AWARD FEE TO MR. HUDSON MARR to $10,000.00. Moving party to prepare form of order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =(302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order And Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-02-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

PLAINTIFF HUDSON MARR'S Motion For An Order And Judgment is a Duplicate entry. =(302/HK)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-07-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-12-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiff Hudson Marr'S Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Settlement
Off Calendar Jul-27-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
David C. Lipps, of Hoyer & Associates, Tel. 415.766.3538, for plaintiffs;
Angel R. Sevilla, of Jackson Lewis P.C., Tel. 415.394.9400, for defendants.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff Hudson Marr's Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Settlement is granted. Final hearing date is set for December 2, 2015, at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302. Order signed in open court. Judge Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/SRB)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Settlement
Off Calendar Jul-20-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF HUDSON MARR'S Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Settlement is continued to July 27, 2015, at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302, to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than July 20, 2015 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

Off Calendar Oct-29-2014 Continued To Aug-10-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Off Calendar Jun-26-2014 Set For Trial On Feb-02-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
